title: We Are Not Alone Not Anymore
description:
A modpack used by Larius11 during his YouTube series and for the Chips & Salsa Discord server.

Contains some horror packs and the full RPG Series mods and YUNG's mods to improve world generation.
body:
Step into a world where the line between reality and nightmare is blurred. We Are Not Alone Not Anymore is a chilling and immersive mod pack designed to keep you on the edge of your seat. Whether exploring the darkest depths of ancient structures or facing supernatural horrors lurking in the shadows, this mod pack will test your courage at every turn.

Key Features:

Unsettling Atmosphere: The eerie presence of The Man From the Fog will haunt your every step. Combined with ImmersiveThunder and Presence Footsteps, every sound becomes a potential threat, and the tension never lets up.

Terrifying Encounters: Face your fears with the Doctor Who: Weeping Angels mod, where these terrifying statues come to life when you’re not looking. The Dahmer's Delight mod adds even more horror elements to keep you on guard.

Survival Horror: Navigate a world where survival is never guaranteed. Mods like Gravestones and TreeChop add layers of realism, making every decision critical to your survival.

Mystical Powers: Harness the dark arts with the Wizards RPG Series and Spell Engine. Use powerful spells and ancient magic to fend off the horrors that stalk you in the night.

Exploration & Adventure: Discover hidden secrets and ancient structures enhanced by YUNG's Better Structures mods. From eerie dungeons to haunted strongholds, every location tells a story of those who came before... and never left.

Dynamic Combat: Prepare for battle with Better Combat and wield unique weapons from Simply Swords. Every encounter with the unknown could be your last, so make sure you're well-equipped.

Immersive World: Enhanced by Complementary Shaders, and SmoothFont, the world around you feels more real—and more terrifying—than ever before.

RPG Elements: Choose your path with RPG-focused mods like Rogues & Warriors, Archers, and Paladins & Priests. Each role offers unique abilities and challenges, helping you survive in a world where nothing is what it seems.

Convenient Tools: Mods like JourneyMap, Waystones, and Controlling ensure you never lose your way, even in the darkest nights.

In We Are Not Alone Not Anymore, you're never truly alone. Something is always watching, waiting in the shadows, ready to strike. Can you survive the terror?
